reviews.comment:
Como todas las estaciones de servicio, te preguntan si te lavan el parabrisas cuando ven que hay cientos de bichos pegados ademas a medida que te vas alejando te cobran mas el litro de combustible, ademas 3 triángulos de sándwiches de miga simples 500 pesos , un vaso mediano de cafe  350 pesos, un abuso

(Translated by Google)
Like all gas stations, they ask if you want them to wash your windshield when they see hundreds of bugs stuck to it. Plus, the further you drive, the more fuel they charge you per liter. And then, three simple finger sandwich triangles cost 500 pesos, and a medium cup of coffee is 350 pesos—it's outrageous!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURHaXE2WDl3RRAB
